options.content:
# Service Hub Operations View

Operational continuity visualization across node synchronization, energy continuity, berth operation, queue stability, and fleet readiness.

Internal propagation logic and business linkage are intentionally excluded.

| Layer | Visible State |
|---|---|
| Node synchronization | stable |
| Energy continuity | synchronized |
| Queue stability | within threshold |
| Fleet readiness | available |
| Dispatch continuity | maintained |
| Berth availability | stable |
| Swap turnaround | controlled |
| ETA continuity | stable |

| Visible Element | Operational Meaning |
|---|---|
| Distributed service hub | operational continuity |
| Energy synchronization | stable fleet operation |
| Berth operation | dispatch continuity |
| Queue management | operational stability |
| Swap-body operation | turnaround continuity |
| Fleet synchronization | stable dispatch execution |
| Urban synchronization | coordinated operation |
